Enumeration Case# MBUF_CSUM_IP_GOOD

macOS 10.12+

```
MBUF_CSUM_IP_GOOD = 0x0200
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/kernel/1644526-anonymous/mbuf_csum_ip_good#discussion)

Indicates whether or not the IP checksum was good or bad. Only valid when MBUF_CSUM_DID_IP is set.
